title: RACI Matrix Schema
description: Schema for defining Responsible, Accountable, Consulted and Informed assignments across regulatory reporting activities, data standards, or any project task domain.

RaciRole.description: R = Responsible (does the work), A = Accountable (owns the outcome, single per activity), C = Consulted (provides input before/during), I = Informed (notified after)

RaciAssignment.description: The role(s) assigned to a single party for a single activity.

party_id.description: Reference to a Party.id defined in this matrix.

roles.description: One or more RACI roles assigned to this party for the activity. Accountable (A) must appear exactly once per activity across all assignments.

notes.description: Optional clarification of the assignment (e.g. conditions, escalation path).

Activity.description: A discrete task, process step, reporting obligation or governance action.

id.description: Unique identifier for the activity within this matrix (e.g. 'ACT-001').

name.description: Short descriptive name of the activity.

description.description: Full description of what the activity involves and its expected outcome.

tags.description: Freeform keywords for filtering and search.

trigger.description: What initiates this activity (e.g. 'Quarter end', 'Regulatory change', 'Ad-hoc APRA direction').

deadline_days.description: Number of days after the trigger by which the activity must be complete.

standard_refs.description: References to regulatory standards or policies this activity satisfies (e.g. 'SRS_550.0').

assignments.description: The set of party-role assignments for this activity. Exactly one party must hold role A.

Party.description: A person, role, team, system or external entity that can be assigned RACI responsibilities.

id.description: Unique identifier used in assignment references (e.g. 'PARTY-001').

name.description: Display name of the party (e.g. 'Investment Operations', 'CFO', 'APRA Connect System').

contact.description: Email address or contact reference for the party.

description.description: Additional context about the party's function or scope.

RaciMatrix.description: Root object representing a complete RACI matrix for a defined scope (project, regulation, domain).

$schema.description: Reference to the JSON Schema governing this document.

id.description: Unique identifier for this RACI matrix instance.

name.description: Human-readable name of the RACI matrix.

description.description: Purpose and scope of this matrix.

owner.description: Party responsible for maintaining this matrix document.

effective_date.description: ISO 8601 date from which this matrix applies.

review_date.description: ISO 8601 date when this matrix is next scheduled for review.

parties.description: All parties that may be referenced in activity assignments.

activities.description: All activities governed by this RACI matrix.
